expectations.evidence: Valid JSON but different schema: uses subject{}, contract_summary{}, risk_assessment{} instead of investigation_context{}, summary{}. Findings use 'F1' string IDs. Missing dismissed[] as separate array.

F1: 'Threshold gaming via contract amendment'. Excellent: 'originally 235,889.40 EUR...reduced to 212,783.85 EUR -- exactly 2,216.15 EUR below the 215,000 EUR EU procurement threshold'. Explains Directive 2014/24/EU.
F3: '74.2% of CRZ contract value from single buyer'. DREVEX received 8.5x more than next supplier. No UVO procurement URLs.

F3: 'Rural municipalities may have limited supplier options for specialized furniture. However, the contract values are substantial (464K+ EUR in 9 days) and the absence of any UVO procurement links raises concerns.'
3 CONFIRMED (F1, F2, F3), 3 INCONCLUSIVE (F4, F5, F6), 2 DISMISSED (F7, F8). All properly classified.
Caught the tax debtor false positive (F8): 'Matches found were for unrelated companies: Drevex Revuca s.r.o. and EURO DREVEX'. Excellent validation.
